org.key_project.util.java

Class IOUtil

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.java.IOUtil

  • public final class IOUtil
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides static methods to work with java IO.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static interface  IOUtil.IFileVisitor
      A visitor which does something with Files.
      static class  IOUtil.LineInformation
      A line information returned from computeLineInformation(File) and computeLineInformation(InputStream).

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int BUFFER_SIZE
      The size of used buffers.
      static java.nio.charset.Charset DEFAULT_CHARSET
      The default charset to use.

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static IOUtil.LineInformation[] computeLineInformation(java.io.File file)
      Computes line information for each text line in the given File.
      static IOUtil.LineInformation[] computeLineInformation(java.io.InputStream in)
      Computes line information for each text line in the given InputStream.
      static java.lang.String computeMD5(java.io.File file)
      Computes the MD5 checksum of the given File.
      static java.lang.String computeMD5(java.io.InputStream in)
      Computes the MD5 checksum of the given InputStream and closes it.
      static boolean contains(java.io.File parent, java.io.File child)
      Checks if the given parent File contains (recursive) the child File.
      static boolean contains(java.lang.Iterable<java.io.File> parents, java.io.File child)
      Checks if at least one given parent File contains (recursive) the child File.
      static boolean copy(java.io.InputStream source, java.io.OutputStream target)
      Copies the content from the InputStream to the OutputStream and closes both streams.
      static java.io.File createTempDirectory(java.lang.String prefix, java.lang.String suffix)
      Creates a temporary directory with help of File.createTempFile(String, String).
      static void delete(java.io.File file)
      Deletes the given file/folder with all contained sub files/folders.
      static boolean exists(java.io.File file)
      Checks if the given File exists.

      Extracts a ZIP archive to the given target directory.

      static java.net.URL getClassLocationURL(java.lang.Class<?> classInstance)

      Returns the current directory.

      Returns the file extension of the given File if available.

      Returns the file name without file extension for the given file name with extension.

      Returns the home directory.

      static java.io.File getTempDirectory()
      Returns the temporary directory.

      Tries to open a stream with the given file name.

      Reads the complete content from the File.

      Reads the complete content from the InputStream and closes it.

      Reads the complete content from the URL.

      Searches recursive in the given File all Files accepted by the given IFilter.

      static java.lang.String toFileString(java.net.URL url) 
      static java.net.URI toURI(java.net.URL url) 
      static java.io.InputStream unifyLineBreaks(java.io.InputStream in)
      Replaces all line breaks (\r, \r\n) in the given InputStream with \n.
      static java.lang.String validateOSIndependentFileName(java.lang.String name)
      Ensures that the segment is a valid OS independent path segment meaning that it is a valid file/folder name.
      static void visit(java.io.File file, IOUtil.IFileVisitor visitor)
      Visits recursive all files and folders.

      Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it.

      Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it.

      Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it.

    • Field Detail

      • BUFFER_SIZE

        public static final int BUFFER_SIZE
        The size of used buffers.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_CHARSET

        public static final java.nio.charset.Charset DEFAULT_CHARSET
        The default charset to use. The value is independent from the current operating system.

    • Method Detail

      • computeMD5

        public static java.lang.String computeMD5(java.io.File file)
                                   throws java.io.IOException
        Computes the MD5 checksum of the given File.
        Parameters:
        file - The File to compute its MD5 checksum.
        Returns:
        The computed MD5 checksum.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • computeMD5

        public static java.lang.String computeMD5(java.io.InputStream in)
                                   throws java.io.IOException
        Computes the MD5 checksum of the given InputStream and closes it.
        Parameters:
        in - The InputStream which provides the content to compute its MD5 checksum. The InputStream will be closed.
        Returns:
        The computed MD5 checksum.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • getHomeDirectory

        public static java.io.File getHomeDirectory()
        Returns the home directory.
        Returns:
        The home directory.

      • getFileExtension

        public static java.lang.String getFileExtension(java.io.File file)
        Returns the file extension of the given File if available.
        Parameters:
        file - The file to extract it extension.
        Returns:
        The file extension or null if not available.

      • getFileNameWithoutExtension

        public static java.lang.String getFileNameWithoutExtension(java.lang.String fileName)
        Returns the file name without file extension for the given file name with extension.
        Parameters:
        fileName - The file name with extension for that the file name without extension is needed.
        Returns:
        The file name without extension or null if it was not possible to compute it.

      • delete

        public static void delete(java.io.File file)
        Deletes the given file/folder with all contained sub files/folders.
        Parameters:
        file - The file/folder to delete.

      • readFrom

        public static java.lang.String readFrom(java.net.URL url)
                                 throws java.io.IOException
        Reads the complete content from the URL.
        Parameters:
        url - The URL to read from.
        Returns:
        The read content or null if the URL is null.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • readFrom

        public static java.lang.String readFrom(java.io.File file)
                                 throws java.io.IOException
        Reads the complete content from the File.
        Parameters:
        file - The File to read from.
        Returns:
        The read content or null if the File is null or not an existing file.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • readFrom

        public static java.lang.String readFrom(java.io.InputStream in)
                                 throws java.io.IOException
        Reads the complete content from the InputStream and closes it.
        Parameters:
        in - The InputStream to read from and to close.
        Returns:
        The read content or null if the InputStream is null.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • writeTo

        public static void writeTo(java.io.OutputStream out,
                           java.lang.String content)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it. Nothing will be written if the content is null, but the stream will be closed.
        Parameters:
        out - The OutputStream to write to.
        content - The content to write.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • writeTo

        public static void writeTo(java.io.OutputStream out,
                           java.lang.String content,
                           java.nio.charset.Charset encoding)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it. Nothing will be written if the content is null, but the stream will be closed.
        Parameters:
        out - The OutputStream to write to.
        content - The content to write.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • writeTo

        public static void writeTo(java.io.OutputStream out,
                           java.lang.String content,
                           java.lang.String encoding)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it. Nothing will be written if the content is null, but the stream will be closed.
        Parameters:
        out - The OutputStream to write to.
        content - The content to write.
        encoding - The encoding to use.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • computeLineInformation

        public static IOUtil.LineInformation[] computeLineInformation(java.io.File file)
                                                       throws java.io.IOException

        Computes line information for each text line in the given File. A IOUtil.LineInformation consists of the offset from the beginning of the file for each line and the indices of tabs '\t' in each line.

        Example content, line break is '\n': 

         Line 1
 Line 2: With some text

 Line 4
        Computed line start indices: 
        
 result[0] = new LineInformation(0, new int[0]);
 result[1] = new LineInformation(7, new int[] {7});
 result[2] = new LineInformation(30, new int[0]);
 result[3] = new LineInformation(31, new int[0]);

        Parameters:
        file - The given File.
        Returns:
        The computed start indices.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • computeLineInformation

        public static IOUtil.LineInformation[] computeLineInformation(java.io.InputStream in)
                                                       throws java.io.IOException

        Computes line information for each text line in the given InputStream. A IOUtil.LineInformation consists of the offset from the beginning of the file for each line and the indices of tabs '\t' in each line.

        Example content, line break is '\n': 

         Line 1
 Line 2:\tWith some text

 Line 4
        Computed line start indices: 
        
 result[0] = new LineInformation(0, new int[0]);
 result[1] = new LineInformation(7, new int[] {7});
 result[2] = new LineInformation(30, new int[0]);
 result[3] = new LineInformation(31, new int[0]);

        Parameters:
        in - The given File.
        Returns:
        The computed start indices.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • createTempDirectory

        public static java.io.File createTempDirectory(java.lang.String prefix,
                                               java.lang.String suffix)
                                        throws java.io.IOException
        Creates a temporary directory with help of File.createTempFile(String, String).
        Parameters:
        prefix - The prefix string to be used in generating the file's name; must be at least three characters long.
        suffix - The suffix string to be used in generating the file's name; may be null, in which case the suffix ".tmp" will be used.
        Returns:
        Created temporary directory.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • search

        public static java.util.List<java.io.File> search(java.io.File file,
                                                  IFilter<java.io.File> filter)
                                           throws java.io.IOException
        Searches recursive in the given File all Files accepted by the given IFilter.
        Parameters:
        file - The File to start search in.
        filter - An optional IFilter used to accept files. Without a filter all Files are accepted.
        Returns:
        The accepted Files.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception

      • visit

        public static void visit(java.io.File file,
                         IOUtil.IFileVisitor visitor)
                  throws java.io.IOException
        Visits recursive all files and folders.
        Parameters:
        file - The File to start in.
        visitor - The IOUtil.IFileVisitor which does something with the visited files
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception

      • unifyLineBreaks

        public static java.io.InputStream unifyLineBreaks(java.io.InputStream in)
                                           throws java.io.IOException
        Replaces all line breaks (\r, \r\n) in the given InputStream with \n.
        Parameters:
        in - The InputStream to replace line breaks in.
        Returns:
        A new InputStream with with the replaced line breaks.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • contains

        public static boolean contains(java.lang.Iterable<java.io.File> parents,
                               java.io.File child)
        Checks if at least one given parent File contains (recursive) the child File.
        Parameters:
        parents - The parent File.
        child - The child File to check for containment in parents.
        Returns:
        true child is contained (recursive) in at least one parent, false child is not contained in any parent.

      • contains

        public static boolean contains(java.io.File parent,
                               java.io.File child)
        Checks if the given parent File contains (recursive) the child File.
        Parameters:
        parent - The parent File.
        child - The child File to check for containment in parent.
        Returns:
        true child is contained (recursive) in parent, false child is not contained in parent.

      • copy

        public static boolean copy(java.io.InputStream source,
                           java.io.OutputStream target)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Copies the content from the InputStream to the OutputStream and closes both streams.
        Parameters:
        source - The InputStream to read from.
        target - The OutputStream to write to.
        Returns:
        true if copy was performed and false if not performed.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • exists

        public static boolean exists(java.io.File file)
        Checks if the given File exists.
        Parameters:
        file - The File to check.
        Returns:
        true File is not null and exists, false otherwise.

        public static java.net.URL getClassLocationURL(java.lang.Class<?> classInstance)

      • getClassLocation

        public static java.io.File getClassLocation(java.lang.Class<?> classInstance)

      • getProjectRoot

        public static java.io.File getProjectRoot(java.lang.Class<?> classInstance)

      • toFile

        public static java.io.File toFile(java.net.URL url)

      • toFileString

        public static java.lang.String toFileString(java.net.URL url)

      • toURI

        public static java.net.URI toURI(java.net.URL url)

      • getCurrentDirectory

        public static java.io.File getCurrentDirectory()
        Returns the current directory.
        Returns:
        The current directory.

      • getTempDirectory

        public static java.io.File getTempDirectory()
        Returns the temporary directory.
        Returns:
        The temporary directory.

      • validateOSIndependentFileName

        public static java.lang.String validateOSIndependentFileName(java.lang.String name)
        Ensures that the segment is a valid OS independent path segment meaning that it is a valid file/folder name. Each invalid sign will be replaced by '_'.
        Parameters:
        name - The segment to validate.
        Returns:
        The validated OS independent path segment in which each invalid sign is replaced.

      • extractZip

        public static void extractZip(java.nio.file.Path archive,
                              java.nio.file.Path targetDir)
                       throws java.io.IOException
        Extracts a ZIP archive to the given target directory.
        Parameters:
        archive - the ZIP archive to extract
        targetDir - the directory the extracted files will be located in
        Throws:
        java.util.zip.ZipException - if a ZIP format error occurs
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs

      • openStream

        public static java.io.InputStream openStream(java.lang.String resourceLocation)
                                      throws java.io.IOException
        Tries to open a stream with the given file name.
        Parameters:
        resourceLocation - either an URL or a file name
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if file could not be opened
